title: Firework Duration Indicators
description: Fireworks now show a visual indicator of the flight duration level in the bottom left of the texture! Great for PvP and casual gameplay!
body:
Fireworks now show the flight duration level in the bottom left of the texture! Great for PvP and casual gameplay!

![Firework textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e70b953fad894da8523481d0af408d611b96c94.png)

[Please report any bugs to me on discord](https://discord.com/users/761775444516929538)

Thanks to [Fishysalmon02](https://modrinth.com/user/Fishysalmon02) for help with fixing some bugs!

Made by MrNoodleStroodle
